scenario_summary: CI stub for the 2010 DFRWS Nitroba wardrive pcap challenge. Campus packet capture tracing harassing email from a dorm resident to a faculty member. This manifest covers the committed stub fixture used by the dataset-hash-verify CI gate only.
expected_investigation_path: pivot to roster + MAC + dorm room
memorization_risk_note: The Nitroba challenge is a 2010 competition dataset with published community writeups. Memorization risk is medium — the wardrive scenario is widely discussed but per-packet evidence paths require genuine forensic reasoning. The stub in this manifest is a minimal pcap header for CI only; the full 56 MB pcap is gitignored and hash-verified locally.
notes: Truncated stub used only for CI dataset-hash-verify. The stub is a 24-byte valid pcap global header (no packet records). Full Nitroba pcap SHA256 is pinned in nitroba.manifest.json.
